chapter_title.en: Chapter 92 – Regarding the souls of the Infidels

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/227)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/227)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) شَرُّ بِئْرٍ فِي النَّارِ بَرَهُوتُ الَّذِي فِيهِ أَرْوَاحُ الْكُفَّارِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, by a chain of his, said,
‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The most evil of the wells in the Fire is Barhout (a valley in Yemen) in which are the souls of the Infidels’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad through the chain of his narrators has said the following: “’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The worst well in the fire is the well of Barahut in which the souls (spirits) of unbelievers live.’”
